title_cn: 据称，阿波罗旗下的汽车供应商天纳克将寻求银行进行 IPO
summary: Tenneco Inc. has picked banks to lead its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as the automotive supplier advances a public listing four years after it was acquired by Apollo Global Management Inc.

title: Oil Steadies After Clashes Around Hormuz Strain Fragile Truce
title_cn: 霍尔木兹紧张局势紧张休战后油价稳定
summary: Oil steadied after Monday’s jump, as traders tracked the increasingly fragile four-week ceasefire in the Middle East following fresh clashes between the US and Iran.

title: EQT Raises Bid for UK Testing Firm Intertek to £8.9 Billion
title_cn: EQT 将英国测试公司 Intertek 的出价提高至 89 亿英镑
summary: EQT AB raised its offer for Intertek Group Plc to roughly £8.9 billion ($12.1 billion) as it ramps up its efforts to acquire the British product-testing company.

title: Iraq Slashes Oil Prices for Buyers Willing to Transit Hormuz
title_cn: 伊拉克为愿意过境霍尔木兹的买家降低油价
summary: Iraq is offering its term buyers huge discounts for crude loaded this month, but tankers will have to transit the Strait of Hormuz to collect the barrels deep inside the Persian Gulf just as hostilities flare in the region.

title: EU Has Tools If US Threatens Industries, French Minister Says
title_cn: 法国部长表示，如果美国威胁工业，欧盟有工具
summary: The European Union has tools that it can turn to if Donald Trump makes excessive threats to strategic industries such as steel, French Trade Minister Nicolas Forissier said.

title: Rheinmetall Misses Estimate as Sales Shift to Second Quarter
title_cn: 随着销售转向第二季度，莱茵金属未达预期
summary: Rheinmetall AG reported preliminary sales in the first three months of the year that fell short of analyst estimates as Germany’s biggest defense contractor predicted a shift of revenue into the current quarter.

title: Ships Cluster Further From Hormuz Strait as Iran Widens Grip
title_cn: 随着伊朗扩大控制，船只聚集在远离霍尔木兹海峡的地方
summary: Hundreds of vessels were seen clustering near Dubai on Tuesday, as more ships moved away from a still-empty Strait of Hormuz in response to Iran’s efforts to widen its area of control.

title: Japan Has Two More Key Windows for Yen Intervention by IMF Rules
title_cn: 日本还有两个根据国际货币基金组织规则干预日元的关键窗口
summary: Japan can conduct only two more sessions of three-day interventions by November if it wants to maintain its status of having a freely floating exchange rate, based on International Monetary Fund guidelines.

title: Leo Pharma Eyes $800 Million Deal Push as IPO Plans Advance
title_cn: 随着 IPO 计划的推进，Leo Pharma 着眼于 8 亿美元的交易推动
summary: Leo Pharma is actively seeking more acquisition targets, with as much as 5 billion kroner ($800 million) to spend on dealmaking as it positions itself for an initial public offering, according to its top management.

title: Audi Pledges Cost Cuts as Trump’s Tariff Plan Threatens Outlook
title_cn: 由于特朗普的关税计划威胁前景，奥迪承诺削减成本
summary: Volkswagen AG’s Audi is pushing to become leaner as the German carmaker tries to offset waning sales in China and the mounting cost of global trade hurdles.

title: Alphabet Returns to Euro Debt Market for Latest AI Megabond Deal
title_cn: Alphabet 重返欧元债券市场进行最新人工智能超级债券交易
summary: Alphabet Inc. has kicked off its latest megabond deal as it returns to the euro market just months after selling nearly $32 billion of dollar, sterling and Swiss franc-denominated notes.

title: The China Show 5/5/2026 (Video)
Iran War: Flareup of Violence Tests Ceasefire | Daybreak Europe 05/05/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：暴力冲突考验停火 |欧洲黎明 05/05/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, the four-week ceasefire in the Middle East has been tested by a flareup of violence between the US and Iran. The American military fought off attacks from Iranian drones, missiles and armed small boats as it guided two US-flagged vessels through the Strait of Hormuz.

Plus Bloomberg understands that Apple is exploring using Intel and Samsung to produce the main processors for its devices in the US. Doing so would offer a secondary option beyond its longtime partner TSMC.

Today's guest: Sunaina Sinha Haldea, Raymond James, Global Head of Private Capital Advisory. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New World Weighs Sale of Stake in $2 Billion HK Hotel Portfolio
title_cn: 新世界考虑出售价值 20 亿美元的香港酒店组合股份
summary: New World Development Co., the cash-strapped property developer, is in talks to sell its 50% stake in a portfolio of three Hong Kong hotels valued at a total of $2 billion, people familiar with the matter said.

title: ASG Hospital Said to Plan Filing for $500 Million IPO This Month
title_cn: 据称 ASG 医院计划本月申请 5 亿美元的 IPO
summary: ASG Hospital Pvt., an Indian eye-care chain backed by General Atlantic, is planning to file for an initial public offering as early as this month that could raise up to $500 million, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Ship Attacks Reignite US-Iran War Risks  | Insight with Haslinda Amin 05/05/2026
title_cn: 船只袭击重燃美伊战争风险哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 05/05/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesian Growth Surges to 5.6% Despite Iran Energy Crisis
title_cn: 尽管伊朗能源危机，印尼经济增速仍飙升至 5.6%
summary: Indonesia’s economic growth accelerated to a three-year high in the first quarter, as a record increase in government spending helped support consumers in the face of a global energy crisis.

title: Malaysian Minister Calls for Update on ‘Corporate Mafia’ Probe
title_cn: 马来西亚部长呼吁更新“企业黑手党”调查
summary: A Malaysian minister urged the country’s police chief to clarify the status of investigations into allegations a network of businessmen was colluding with anti-graft agency officials to oust executives.

title: BlackRock Touts ETFs as Liquidity Antidote to Private Exposure
title_cn: 贝莱德将 ETF 吹捧为应对私人风险敞口的流动性解药
summary: Exchange-traded funds can be the source of liquidity that retail investors need after ramping up exposure to private assets, BlackRock Inc. executives wrote in a report.

title: Stocks Drop on Renewed Iran Tensions, Dollar Gains: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 伊朗紧张局势再度升级，股市下跌，美元上涨：市场收尾
summary: Stocks pulled back from record highs and the dollar strengthened after the US and Iran exchanged fire, escalating Middle East tensions and fueling inflation concerns.

title: HSBC Misses Estimates on Fraud Charge, Economic Risks
title_cn: 汇丰银行欺诈指控和经济风险未达预期
summary: HSBC reported profit that missed estimates, weighed down by an unexpected UK fraud-related charge and rising economic risks stemming from the conflict in the Middle East. Tomasz Noetzel of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amb. Jordan: Flareup Could Mean US-Iran on Cusp of Deal
title_cn: 安布。约旦：爆发可能意味着美伊即将达成协议
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fire in a flareup of violence that also drew in the UAE, prompting calls for renewed strikes on Iranian targets and casting doubt on the fate of a four-week ceasefire. But Former US Ambassador to Saudi Arabia, Robert W. Jordan told Bloomberg’s Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche that a flareup could mean the two parties are close to a deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTSE 100 Falls as HSBC Weighs, Gilts Tumble
title_cn: 汇丰银行承压、金边债券重挫，富时 100 指数下跌

title: Copper Drops as Iran and US Trade Fire in Gulf, Testing Truce
title_cn: 伊朗和美国在海湾贸易交火，测试休战，铜价下跌
summary: Copper fell after the US and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf on Monday, casting doubt over the fate of a ceasefire and raising concerns about further escalation in the conflict that’s upended global markets.

title: Indian Rupee at Record Low as Analysts Dust Off 2013 RBI Playbook
title_cn: 分析师公布 2013 年印度储备银行策略，印度卢比跌至历史新低
summary: The Indian rupee fell to a record low as crude prices rose following a flare-up in violence in the Middle East, leading analysts to consider whether the central bank may return to its 2013 playbook to support the currency.

title: Alabbar: Dubai Property Market Resilient
title_cn: 阿拉巴尔：迪拜房地产市场具有弹性
summary: Emaar Properties Founder Mohamed Alabbar says that Dubai’s property market remains resilient despite regional tensions, citing strong buyer confidence and stable collections across customers. While acknowledging short-term supply chain disruptions linked to the Strait of Hormuz closure, Alabbar expects a quick regional rebound. He spoke with Bloomberg TV’s Joumanna Bercetche from the sidelines of MIITE in Abu Dhabi.

title: Markets on Edge as US, Iran Trade Fire in Gulf | The Asia Trade 5/5/2026
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在海湾交火，市场紧张|亚洲贸易 5/5/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Paul Allen, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Yotta Data Said to Hire Advisors for $900 Million India IPO
title_cn: Yotta Data 据称将聘请顾问进行 9 亿美元的印度 IPO
summary: Yotta Data Services Pvt. is weighing an initial public offering in Mumbai that could raise as much as $900 million and has engaged investment banks for the process, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Iran Draws a Line and Puts Markets on Notice
title_cn: 伊朗划定界限并引起市场注意
summary: Clash in Gulf sends Brent, inflation expectations to landmark highs.

title: Indonesia Intervenes in Markets as Rupiah Sets New Record Low
title_cn: 印尼卢比创历史新低，干预市场
summary: Indonesia’s central bank intervened in the foreign-exchange markets as the rupiah set a new record low.

title: US and Iran Trade Fire in the Gulf, UAE Intercepts Missiles
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在海湾交火，阿联酋拦截导弹
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf in a flareup of violence on Monday that also drew in the United Arab Emirates. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Is Debating a Digital Euro But Progress Is Slow
title_cn: 欧洲正在讨论数字欧元但进展缓慢
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde’s push to speed up plans for a digital euro is part of a broader geopolitical effort for independence and autonomy, where the bloc is less reliant on others and can reduce exposure to major economies like the US and China. Bloomberg's Anna Irrera reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Considers Using Intel, Samsung to Build Device Processors
title_cn: 苹果考虑使用英特尔、三星来制造设备处理器
summary: Apple has held exploratory discussions about using Intel and Samsung to produce the main processors for its devices in the US. According to people familiar with the deliberations, Apple had early-stage talks with Intel about enlisting the company's chipmaking services. Apple executives also made visits to a Samsung plant under development in Texas. The move would offer a secondary option beyond longtime partner TSMC. Bloomberg's Neil Campling explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Grab to Retool in Indonesia After Abrupt Ride-Commission Cut
title_cn: 突然削减乘车佣金后 Grab 在印度尼西亚进行重组
summary: Grab Holdings Ltd. plans to adjust its Indonesian business after Jakarta’s surprise edict to lower the ride-hailing commissions it can charge, though executives expect the decree to cover just a fraction of its fleet.

title: AI Threatens Private Debt Recovery in Software: Davidson Kempner
title_cn: 人工智能威胁软件领域的私人债务追收：Davidson Kempner
summary: Disruptions caused by artificial intelligence are threatening private credit firms’ potential recovery rates in the software sector, according to Davidson Kempner Capital Management LP chief investment officer Tony Yoseloff.

title: Starwood CEO on Business Strategy, AI, Data Centers
title_cn: 喜达屋首席执行官谈商业战略、人工智能、数据中心
summary: Barry Sternlicht, Chairman and CEO at Starwood Capital Group, discusses the company's business strategy and investing in AI and data centers. He speaks with Romaine Bostick from the sidelines of the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Star Sports Jumps 204% as Hong Kong Debut Frenzy Extends
title_cn: 香港首秀热潮延续 Star Sports 股价跃升 204%
summary: Shares of Star Sports Medicine Co., a maker of medical devices, surged as much as 204% in their Hong Kong trading debut on Tuesday, extending a run of hot first-day performances in the city.

title: Apple Explores Using Intel and Samsung to Build Main Device Chips in the US
title_cn: 苹果探索使用英特尔和三星在美国制造主要设备芯片
summary: Apple Inc. has held exploratory discussions about using Intel Corp. and Samsung Electronics Co. to produce the main processors for its devices in the US, a move that would offer a secondary option beyond longtime partner Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.

title: Apple Plans to Let Users Build Their Own Passes in iOS 27 Wallet App
title_cn: 苹果计划让用户在 iOS 27 钱包应用程序中构建自己的通证
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing a new “Create a Pass” feature for its next major iPhone software update, allowing users to build and customize their own digital tickets and gift cards within the Wallet app.

title: Alvarez & Marsal Wants to Make $3.5 Billion From AI Work by 2028
title_cn: 阿尔瓦雷斯& Marsal 希望到 2028 年从人工智能工作中赚取 35 亿美元
summary: Alvarez & Marsal wants to generate 50% of its revenue from artificial intelligence work by 2028, which would represent as much as $3.5 billion in earnings.

title: ServiceNow Sees $30 Billion Revenue by 2030 on AI Uplift
title_cn: ServiceNow 预计到 2030 年人工智能提升收入将达到 300 亿美元
summary: ServiceNow Inc. projected it would generate $30 billion of subscription revenue in 2030, attributing the strong outlook to traction from its AI products.

title: Meta Taps Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan for El Paso Data Center Deal
title_cn: Meta 聘请摩根士丹利和摩根大通参与埃尔帕索数据中心交易
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is working on a financing package for a data center in El Paso, Texas, that could total roughly $13 billion, underscoring Big Tech’s growing reliance on debt to bankroll the infrastructure behind the AI boom.

title: Live From the Milken Institute Global Conference | The Close 5/4/2026
title_cn: 米尔肯研究所全球会议直播|收盘价 2026 年 5 月 4 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Man Group CEO Robyn Grew, Goldman Sachs’ Marc Nachmann, Allspring Global Investments CEO Kate Burke, Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX), IBM Vice Chairman Gary Cohn, BlackRock’s Joe DeVico, eMed CEO Linda Yaccarino & Fmr. NFL Quarterback Tom Brady, Janus Henderson CEO Ali Dibadj, Pretium CEO Don Mullen, BNY CEO Robin Vince, PIMCO President Christian Stracke, Morgan Stanley’s Dan Simkowitz, Kalshi Board Member Brian Quintenz, Oak Hill Advisors CEO Glenn August, State Street CEO Ron O’Hanley, Spelman College Interim President Roz Brewer, & Guggenheim Partners’ Anne Walsh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Citadel Chief Technology Officer Joining Motive Partners
title_cn: 前 Citadel 首席技术官加入 Motive Partners
summary: Citadel’s former Chief Technology Officer Umesh Subramanian is joining private investment firm Motive Partners, where he will lead its artificial-intelligence push.

title: Dell Grants COO Clarke Performance Options Worth $132 Million
title_cn: 戴尔授予首席运营官克拉克价值 1.32 亿美元的绩效期权
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. granted Chief Operating Officer Jeff Clarke stock options estimated to be worth $132.4 million in 2031 if the company meets annual performance goals.

title: GameStop's Cohen Sees New Target and Big Possible Payday in eBay
title_cn: GameStop 的科恩在 eBay 上看到了新的目标和可能的大收获
summary: The CEO who helped define the meme-stock era has proposed a brash, unsolicited $56 billion offer for the online commerce company.

title: Sonos Seeks $40 Million in Tariff Refunds and Revenue Jumps 8%
title_cn: Sonos 寻求 4000 万美元关税退款，收入猛增 8%
summary: Sonos Inc. shares climbed after reporting revenue that jumped 8% and said that it is filing for tariff refunds totaling $40 million that could help counterbalance rising memory costs.

title: Palantir Raises Revenue Outlook, Misses on Commercial Sales
title_cn: Palantir 上调收入预期，但商业销售未达预期
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. raised its revenue outlook for the year and beat analyst forecasts, offering a bullish forecast for a polarizing company at the nexus of debates over data, surveillance and artificial intelligence-enabled warfare.

title: Musk’s Lawyer Pushes OpenAI’s Brockman to Give Back $29 Billion
title_cn: 马斯克的律师敦促 OpenAI 的布罗克曼退还 290 亿美元
summary: OpenAI co-founder and President Greg Brockman testified that his stake in the startup is now worth almost $30 billion, prompting an attorney for Elon Musk to ask why he had not donated the bulk of his earnings to the ChatGPT maker’s nonprofit foundation.

title: Morgan Stanley's Simkowitz on AI Financing, M&A Resurgence
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的 Simkowitz 谈人工智能融资、并购复苏
summary: Morgan Stanley Co-President Dan Simkowitz discusses current market conditions, AI financing, and a solid dealmaking backdrop fueling a 'resurgence' in M&A. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BNY CEO: AI Helps 'Turbocharge' Business
title_cn: 纽约银行首席执行官：人工智能帮助“涡轮增压”业务
summary:
BNY CEO Robin Vince discusses the impacts of AI on business, including product improvement, operational efficiency, and providing cost cutting for clients. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Janus Henderson CEO 'Energized' About Trian Deal
title_cn: Janus Henderson 首席执行官对 Trian 交易“充满活力”
summary: Janus Henderson CEO Ali Dibadj says the firm is “energized” about the Trian deal, which will allow for investment in technology and AI to improve performance. He also talks about plans to launch US ETF products in the global market. He speaks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GameStop’s $56 Billion Bid for eBay | Bloomberg Tech 5/4/2026
title_cn: GameStop 以 560 亿美元收购 eBay |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 4 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde discusses GameStop's $56 billion offer to buy eBay, a company four-times its size. Plus, AI chipmaker Cerebras is looking to raise as much as $3.5 billion in its upcoming IPO. And, OpenAI raises more than $4 billion for a new joint venture that aims to help businesses adopt its AI software. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pinterest Jumps on Outlook Signaling Strong Advertising Growth
title_cn: Pinterest 的展望跃升，预示着广告的强劲增长
summary: Pinterest Inc. shares jumped almost 20% in extended trading after the company reported first-quarter sales that topped analyst estimates, and gave an outlook for revenue in the current period that was higher than anticipated.

title: EU in Talks With Anthropic to Get Banks Tested for Mythos Flaws
title_cn: 欧盟正在与 Anthropic 进行谈判，让银行接受神话缺陷测试
summary: The European Union is in talks with Anthropic PBC about getting its companies and banks tested for any vulnerabilities that the new Mythos AI model uncovers.

title: Take-Two CEO Says ‘Grand Theft Auto VI’ Expectations Are ‘Terrifying’
title_cn: Take-Two 首席执行官表示《侠盗猎车手 VI》的预期“令人恐惧”
summary: The upcoming video game is expected to be one of the biggest entertainment releases of all time

title: Thoma Bravo Is Combing Every BDC Book for Software Loan Bargains
title_cn: Thoma Bravo 正在梳理每本 BDC 书籍以获取软件贷款优惠
summary: Thoma Bravo brands itself as the world’s largest software-focused investment firm. And it’s only looking to get bigger in the space.

title: Trump Will Add ‘Many More’ Affordable Homes Says Housing Sec.
title_cn: 住房委员会表示，特朗普将增加“更多”经济适用房
summary: US Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Scott Turner discusses affordability and government efforts to cut regulation. He speaks with Bloomberg Balance of Power co-host Joe Mathieu from the Milken Institute Global Conference in Los Angeles.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Palantir Looks to Prove It Doesn’t Belong in Software Selloff
title_cn: Palantir 希望证明自己不属于软件抛售领域
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. heads into its first-quarter earnings with something to prove to investors: That it’s been wrongly caught up in the selloff that has gripped software stocks for months.

title: Modi Opponents Allege Vote Count Violations After Key State Loss
title_cn: 莫迪的反对者声称在关键国家失败后违反计票规定
summary: India’s opposition parties allege large-scale violations in counting of votes that led to Bharatiya Janata Party’s landslide victory in West Bengal, ousting Mamata Banerjee’s Trinamool Congress.

title: Iran Fires Missiles at UAE in First Attack Since Ceasefire
title_cn: 伊朗向阿联酋发射导弹，这是停火以来的首次袭击
summary: Iran attacked the United Arab Emirates for the first time in almost a month on Monday, fracturing an uneasy calm since a ceasefire was agreed between Tehran and the US-Israel alliance in April.

title: Russia’s Kirishi Oil Refinery on Fire, NASA Satellites Show
title_cn: 美国宇航局卫星显示俄罗斯基里什炼油厂着火
summary: Russia’s Kirishi oil refinery near the Baltic coast is on fire after overnight drone strikes, according to NASA satellite images, as Ukraine ramps up attacks ahead of planned Victory Day ceasefires.

title: India iPhone Hub Stunned by Film Star Vijay’s Political Rise
title_cn: 印度 iPhone Hub 因电影明星 Vijay 的政治崛起而震惊
summary: In most of his films, Tamil superstar C. Joseph Vijay has saved the nation and its poor from powerful forces. He used that same script in politics this week to emerge as the unlikely winner in elections in one of India’s most economically important states.

title: Election Pledges in India Risk Wider Deficits, Economists Warn
title_cn: 经济学家警告称，印度的选举承诺可能会导致赤字扩大
summary: Implementing populist promises that featured prominently in election wins in key Indian states this week risk straining their finances, with economists warning of wider fiscal deficits.

title: BJP’s State Poll Wins Strengthen Modi’s Grip on India
title_cn: 印度人民党在邦民意调查中获胜加强了莫迪对印度的控制
summary: India’s ruling BJP has strengthened Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s political position after decisive state election victories, reshaping the balance between government and opposition. Rahul Verma, Fellow at the Centre for Policy Research and Associate Professor at Shiv Nadar University, spoke on Insight with Haslinda Amin about the implications for governance, reforms, and India’s North-South divide. (Removed name of TV producer.)

title: Ukraine’s Long-Range Drones Now Strike 1,000 Miles Inside Russia
title_cn: 乌克兰远程无人机现可攻击俄罗斯境内 1,000 英里
summary: Ukrainian drones are regularly hitting targets deep inside Russia, reaching to the Ural Mountains and communities where most people had seen the war as a distant problem.

title: Trump-Xi Meeting Approaches Even as Tensions Mount
title_cn: 尽管紧张局势加剧，特习会仍临近
summary: President Donald Trump said he's looking forward to meeting Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, signaling that his plans for the high-stakes summit are still on despite fresh tensions between the world's two largest economies. Bloomberg's Minmin Low reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer’s Troubles Breathe New Life Into Scotland’s Nationalists
title_cn: 斯塔默的麻烦为苏格兰民族主义者注入了新的活力
summary: Polls show the SNP is on course to win a fifth straight term in this week’s election after Labour’s collapse in popularity.

title: Trump Says He Will Bring Up Hong Kong’s Jimmy Lai in Xi Summit
title_cn: 特朗普称将在习近平峰会上提及香港黎智英
summary: US President Donald Trump said he will raise the case of Hong Kong’s imprisoned former media tycoon Jimmy Lai in his upcoming summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, adding a potential friction point to an agenda already complicated by the Iran war.

title: US and Iran Trade Fire in Gulf, Jolting Four-Week-Old Truce
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在海湾交火，动摇了四个星期的休战协议
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fire in a flareup of violence on Monday that also drew in the United Arab Emirates, prompting calls for renewed strikes on Iranian targets and casting doubt on the fate of a four-week ceasefire.

title: Romania Prepares to Oust Premier Without Plan for the Day After
title_cn: 罗马尼亚准备罢黜总理，但没有为第二天做好计划
summary: Romanian lawmakers will vote on ousting Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan in a move that could plunge the country into a renewed political crisis and imperil efforts to narrow the widest budget deficit in the European Union.

title: Taiwan Insists On Right to Visit Allies After African Trip
title_cn: 台湾坚持非洲之行后访问盟友的权利
summary: President Lai Ching-te said Taiwan’s leaders have the right to engage with the world and visit the leaders of allied countries, after completing a diplomatic mission to Africa that his administration claims was nearly thwarted by China.

title: Senate GOP Seeks $1 Billion for Secret Service, Trump Ballroom
title_cn: 参议院共和党寻求 10 亿美元用于特勤局和特朗普宴会厅
summary: A top Senate Republican has proposed spending as much as $1 billion for US Secret Service security adjustments and upgrades, including for President Donald Trump’s planned White House ballroom.

title: Modi Clinches Big Wins as Opponents Ousted in State Polls
title_cn: 莫迪在州民意调查中大获全胜，对手被赶下台
summary: Two years ago, Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi was dealt a humbling blow in national elections, failing to win a majority for the first time since he came to power.

title: Trump Says He Looks Forward to Xi Summit as Tensions Mount
title_cn: 特朗普表示，随着紧张局势加剧，他期待习近平峰会
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s looking forward to meeting Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, signaling his plans for the high-stakes summit are still on despite fresh tensions between the world’s largest economies.

title: Canadian Miner Invested in Cuba Says It's Assessing Trump's Fresh Sanctions
title_cn: 投资古巴的加拿大矿业公司表示正在评估特朗普的新制裁
summary: A Canadian mining company that is among Cuba’s largest foreign investors is consulting with advisers and stakeholders after President Donald Trump expanded US sanctions against the struggling Caribbean nation.

title: Taiwan’s Lai to Speak After Defying China to Visit Africa
title_cn: 台湾赖清德不顾中国访问非洲后发表讲话
summary: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te will soon arrive home following a surprise trip to Africa in defiance of Beijing’s efforts to thwart his diplomatic outreach.

title: Secret Service Officers Shoot Gunman Near the White House
title_cn: 特勤人员在白宫附近射杀枪手
summary: A man was shot by Secret Service officers near the White House Monday afternoon after agents spotted him carrying a concealed firearm and he opened fire, according to the agency’s deputy director.

title: US and Iran Trade Fire, Jolting Four-Week-Old Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国和伊朗交火，动摇了四个星期的停火
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf in a flareup of violence on Monday that also drew in the United Arab Emirates, prompting calls for renewed strikes on Iranian targets and casting doubt on the fate of a four-week ceasefire. Bloomberg's Derek Wallbank breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump's 'Project Freedom' Fans Tensions | Balance of Power: Late Edition 05/04/2026
title_cn: 特朗普的“自由计划”引发粉丝紧张|权力平衡：最新版 05/04/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Commodity Futures Trading Commission Chairman Michael Selig weighs in on prediction markets, insider trading enforcement and the outlook for crypto legislation. Port of Los Angeles Executive Director Gene Seroka says shipping firms are taking a "wait and see" approach to US efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Representative Adam Smith (D-WA), Ranking Member of the House Armed Services Committee, criticizes the administration's Iran strategy. They all speak from the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Smith: Iran Nuclear Threat Wasn't Imminent
title_cn: 史密斯众议员：伊朗核威胁并未迫在眉睫
summary: Representative Adam Smith (D-WA), Ranking Member of the House Armed Services Committee, criticizes the administration's Iran strategy, saying there is "not much evidence" further military escalation would force Tehran to capitulate and arguing the threat of a nuclear weapon was "not imminent" before the campaign began. On the administration's "Project Freedom" plan, he says it is "highly unlikely" insurers will allow commercial ships to transit the Strait of Hormuz despite US protection. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's "Balance of Power: Late Edition" from the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Seroka: Shipping Firms in "Wait and See" Mode
title_cn: Seroka：航运公司处于“观望”模式
summary: Port of Los Angeles Executive Director Gene Seroka says shipping firms are taking a "wait and see" approach to US efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as security risks and rising insurance and freight costs deter traffic. He warns the real supply impact is still ahead, as higher fuel and diesel costs continue to pressure supply chains and small trucking operators. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's "Balance of Power: Late Edition" from the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CFTC's Selig: Hopeful CLARITY Act Can Pass by July 4
title_cn: CFTC 的 Selig：希望 CLARITY 法案能够在 7 月 4 日之前获得通过
summary: Commodity Futures Trading Commission Chairman Michael Selig weighed in on prediction markets, insider trading enforcement and the outlook for crypto legislation. He said Congress is "at the finish line" on a compromise crypto market structure bill and hopes it can reach the president's desk by July 4. Selig defended the CFTC's oversight of prediction markets, applauding exchanges like Kalshi for tightening user requirements and stressing the agency's "zero tolerance" policy on insider trading and market manipulation. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's "Balance of Power: Late Edition" at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Tells UK Leaders All of Society Must Fight Antisemitism
title_cn: 斯塔默告诉英国领导人全社会必须与反犹太主义作斗争
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer is due to host meetings to tackle antisemitism on Tuesday after two men were stabbed in north London last week in the latest attack targeting British Jews.

title: White House Weighs AI Working Group, Model Testing, NYT Reports
title_cn: 白宫权衡人工智能工作组、模型测试、纽约时报报道
summary: The Trump administration is considering an executive order to create a working group on artificial intelligence, according to the New York Times, among a series of steps to boost oversight of the emerging technology.

title: Government, Industry Need 'Partnership' to Address Affordability Concerns, Says Alsobrooks
title_cn: Alsobrooks 表示，政府和行业需要“合作”来解决负担能力问题
summary: Democratic Senator Angela Alsobrooks said the government and private industry need to work together to address longstanding hurdles to creating generational wealth, including the increasingly high barriers to home ownership. Talking live from the Milken Global Conference, Alsobooks said that she is open to hearing ideas from 'all sides,' including leaders in business and finance. Alsobrooks also discussed the status of stablecoin legislation in the Senate, saying that the bipartisan compromise bill she has worked on with Senator Thom Tillis is aimed at allowing innovation while protecting community banks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kentucky Republicans Flashing Warning Signs for GOP Candidates
title_cn: 肯塔基州共和党人对共和党候选人发出警告信号
summary: Some conservatives are conflicted about the war and the economy.

title: Russia Warns Ukraine of Retaliation If May 9 Parade Targeted
title_cn: 俄罗斯警告乌克兰如果5月9日游行成为目标将进行报复
summary: Russia and Ukraine announced distinct ceasefires on different days this week, with Moscow warning Kyiv not to violate its unilateral plans to stand down temporarily on Saturday when it marks the defeat of Nazi Germany in World War II.
